channel.title: Daily Quote — Rev. Randy Lewis
channel.description: A daily quote from the writings and sermons of Rev. Randy Lewis

item.title: If the world is upside down, then we don’t adjust to it. We flip it.
item.description:
When the world feels flipped, let us not simply adapt; instead, let's rise with courage and reshape it. Together, we hold the power to inspire hope and justice in every step we take.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/upside-down/
#Courage #Hope #Justice #Power

item.title: Maybe I am not a project. Maybe I am a person.
item.description:
In a world that often labels us, remember: your essence transcends categories. Embrace your journey of growth, healing, and identity—each step is a celebration of your humanity.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/managing-me/
#Growth #Healing #Humanity #Identity

item.title: Hope is not a wish for things to get better. It’s the belief that things will get better.
item.description:
Hope breathes life into our journey, reminding us that belief is the first step towards transformation. Let us nurture that belief and embrace the future with open hearts.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/hope-is-a-thing-with-feathers/
#Hope #Faith #Resilience #Inspiration

item.title: Covenant says: I will mean what I say, even if you don’t. I will stay in this with you because love calls me to.
item.description:
In our commitment to love, we find strength even when others falter. Let us embrace the journey together, guided by integrity and the bonds of community.
https://revrandylewis.substack.com/p/the-fine-print/
#Commitment #Community #Integrity #Love

item.title: Life works when you work it, but you can only successfully work it when there is hope.
item.description:
Hope is the quiet strength that fuels our journey. When we embrace it, we unlock the potential to transform our lives and uplift those around us. Let it guide your steps today.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/hope-is-a-thing-with-feathers/
#Hope #Growth #Resilience #Motivation

item.title: As a minister, I understand the power that words can have. Words can either build up or tear down; they can bring us together or drive us apart.
item.description:
Words have the power to unite us in our shared humanity or to sow division. Let us choose to uplift, inspire, and foster connection in every conversation.
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/open-letter-to-oklahoma-legislature
#Community #Integrity #Power #Truth

item.title: Today, I am searching my own heart for kindness and love.
item.description:
As we navigate our days, let’s pause and look within for the kindness and love that can transform our interactions. Even the smallest acts can create ripples of hope and healing.
#KindnessMatters #HeartfeltLove #CompassionInAction #SpreadPositivity

item.title: The world needs the feminine energy, no matter the actual gender through which it is expressed.
item.description:
The call for feminine energy is a reminder of our shared humanity, guiding us toward a future rich in compassion and unity. Happy International Women’s Day!
https://blog.revrandylewis.com/a-message-to-men-on-the-eve-of-the-hour-of-the-woman
#FeminineEnergy #Community #Inclusion #Healing #Vision

item.title: We celebrated survival without naming what it cost. And I don’t think we can afford to keep skipping that part.
item.description:
In the journey of life, we often celebrate survival without acknowledging the cost. It's time to honor the truth of our experiences, embracing the resilience that comes from facing our history with courage and grace. https://blog.revrandylewis.com/unbroken
#Healing #Resilience #Truth #History

item.title: Love never left us—we just grew dim for a while, shadowed by fear, anger, and exhaustion.
item.description:
In moments of darkness, we often forget that love is our guiding light. As we navigate through fear and exhaustion, let us remember that healing and hope are ever-present, waiting for us to embrace them anew. Together, we can rise, resilient and united in love. https://blog.revrandylewis.com/bad-moon-rising
#Healing #Hope #Resilience #Love #Humanity

item.title: ‘Unbroken’ doesn’t mean untouched. It means the breaking stopped with us.
item.description:
Healing is not about being untouched; it’s about recognizing our scars and choosing to stop the cycle of pain. Together, we can build a legacy of resilience and strength for future generations. https://blog.revrandylewis.com/unbroken
#Healing #Resilience #Family #Legacy

item.title: Give us the courage and fortitude to do what is in our power to do. May we work toward the greater good, being always mindful of how our actions, or inaction, affect others.
item.description:
In times of uncertainty and strife, we must summon the courage to act toward the greater good. Each of us holds the power to influence our communities positively, and it’s vital to recognize how our choices impact others. Let us embody compassion and justice in our daily lives, honoring those affected by violence and working tirelessly for a brighter future.
Read more: https://blog.revrandylewis.com/prayer-at-the-vigil-for-victims-of-gun-violence
#Community #Compassion #Courage #Justice
